problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
